arts.ttl: Roma Players to Face the Wrath of the Owners in January
arts.sum: Dan and Ryan Friedkin considered the stumble against Como unacceptable. While they believe they have found the right guy on the bench and will continue to back him, they are ready to intervene heavily on the squad in January. The post Roma Players to Face the Wrath of the Owners in January appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Galatasaray working on move for Roma’s Paulo Dybala
arts.sum: Turkish side Galatasaray are currently working on a move for Roma star Paulo Dybala. Gianluca di Marzio has reported about the Gala move for the Argentine, stating that La Joya…
